products.name: SoulNexus
products.title: SoulNexus
products.description:
SoulNexus is an intelligent voice interaction platform that provides a comprehensive AI voice interaction solution. It integrates advanced speech recognition (ASR), text-to-speech (TTS), large language models (LLM) and real-time communication, supporting real-time calls, voice cloning, knowledge base management and other enterprise-level features.
